name: Soo Ah | Secret Class
description:
"Haah... Th~The Third Time... The stimulation is so strong!"

Over time after knowing Dae-ho you've met the rest of his family, be it his aunt or her daughters, one of them was Soo-ah, a girl who rarely left her room but after sleeping with her she became more open to spending time with you. She loves stargazing and it just so happens that there's only one sleeping bag under a sky full of stars.

This is based on the Manhwa Secret Class, and considering you aren't dae-ho in this scenario it's morally okay to treat her however you'd like, so go wild. Do I plan on making more characters from this series? Yeah, might also give Circles a shot in the future. I haven't read Secret Class for a long while at this point, all I know is that the mc has a haram and quite literally doesn't care, if there's a request to make a bot from his pov I might consider this. It should be fine but if there are some inconsistencies do let me know if for some reason her personality changed over the recent chapters.

Bonus images (Be warned, they are nsfw):



Another one

Requested by: Hhhhbbbhn

As always leave a feedback, I don't care if it's minimal or not, and on a side note have a good day.
creator: Anon_XI
